---
title: "Email a Decision Maker"
subtitle: "Send a message to the decision-makers who have the power to make Pacific Coast Highway safer."
---

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
```


Personal messages from community members matter. Use the form below to representatives and call for immediate action to protect cyclists, pedestrians, and everyone who travels this corridor. You can use the provided template or add your own story, connection to PCH, and why safer infrastructure matters to you.

When you click Send Email, your default email app will open with the message ready to send.


```{=html}
<div class="email-box">

  <div class="email-intro">
    <strong>Who receives this email?</strong>
    This message goes to a local city decision maker working on transportation and street safety in Ventura.
    Your voice helps prioritize safer infrastructure for cyclists and pedestrians.
  </div>

  <div class="form-row">
    <div class="form-group">
      <label for="sender-name">Your Name</label>
      <input type="text" id="sender-name" placeholder="Jane Smith" />
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label for="sender-hood">Your Neighborhood <em style="font-weight:400;text-transform:none">(optional)</em></label>
      <input type="text" id="sender-hood" placeholder="e.g. Midtown, Downtown, Montalvo" />
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-group">
    <label for="email-subject">Subject Line</label>
    <input type="text" id="email-subject" value="URGENT: PCH Safety Crisis — Two Cyclists Killed June 11 Near Solimar Beach, Ventura County" />
  </div>

  <div class="form-group">
    <label for="email-body">Your Message</label>
    <textarea id="email-body" oninput="updateCount()">Honorable Representative,
    
We are writing to you with deep urgency and grief on behalf of our community — residents, cyclists, recreational users, and workers who live and travel throughout Ventura County and the greater tri-county area.




Sincerely,
[Your Name]</textarea>
    <div class="char-hint" id="char-count">0 characters</div>
  </div>

  <button class="send-btn" onclick="sendEmail()">✉ Send Email to Decision Maker</button>
  <p class="email-note">
    Clicking "Send Email" opens your default email application with this message pre-filled —
    you can review it before sending. Nothing is sent automatically.
  </p>
</div>

<script>
function updateCount() {
  const len = document.getElementById("email-body").value.length;
  document.getElementById("char-count").textContent = len.toLocaleString() + " characters";
}

function sendEmail() {
  const name    = document.getElementById("sender-name").value.trim();
  const hood    = document.getElementById("sender-hood").value.trim();
  const subject = document.getElementById("email-subject").value.trim();
  let   body    = document.getElementById("email-body").value.trim();

  // Insert name into signature placeholder
  const sig = name ? (hood ? name + ", " + hood + " resident" : name) : "[Your Name]";
  body = body.replace("[Your Name]", sig);

  const mailto = "mailto:saferecventura@gmail.com"
    + "?subject=" + encodeURIComponent(subject)
    + "&body="    + encodeURIComponent(body);

  window.location.href = mailto;
}

// Init count
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", updateCount);
</script>
```

---
